2604.16823.title: Hierarchical Vision Transformer Enhanced by Graph Convolutional Network for Image Classification
2604.16823.paper_summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) has brought new breakthroughs to the field of image classification by introducing the self-attention mechanism and Graph Convolutional Networks(GCN) have been proposed and successfully applied in data representation and analysis. However, there are key challenges which limit their further development: (1) The patch size selected by ViT is crucial for accurate predictions, which raises a natural question: How to select the size of patches properly or how to comprehensively combine small patches and larger patches; (2) While the spatial structure information is important in vision tasks, the 1D position embeddings fails to capture the spatial structure information of patches more accurately; (3) The GCN can capture the local connectivity relationships between image nodes, but it lacks the ability to capture global graph structural information. On the contrary, the self-attention mechanism of ViT can draw the global relation on image patches, but it is unable to model the local structure of image. To overcome such limitations, we propose the Hierarchical Vision Transformer Enhanced by Graph Convolutional Network (GCN-HViT) for image classification. Specifically, the Hierarchical ViT we designed can model patch-wise information interactions on a global scale within each level and model hierarchical relationships between small patches and large patches across multiple levels. In addition, the proposed GCN method functions as a local feature extractor to obtain the local representation of each image patch which serves as a 2D position embedding of each patch in the 2D space. Meanwhile, it models patch-wise information interactions on a local scale within each level. Extensive experiments on 3 real-world datasets demonstrate that GCN-HViT achieves state-of-the-art performance.
2604.16823.paper_summary_zh: Vision Transformer (ViT) 在圖像分類領域帶來了新的突破，通過引入自注意力機制，而圖形卷積網絡 (GCN) 已被提出並成功應用於數據表示和分析。<lb/>然而，存在一些關鍵挑戰限制了它們的進一步發展： (1) ViT 選擇的補丁大小對於準確預測至關重要，這引發了一個自然問題：如何正確選擇補丁的大小，或者如何綜合地結合小補丁和大補丁； (2) 雖然空間結構信息在視覺任務中很重要，但 1D 位置嵌入無法更準確地捕捉補丁的空間結構信息； (3) GCN 可以捕捉圖像節點之間的局部連接關係，但缺乏捕捉全局圖形結構信息的能力。<lb/>相反，ViT 的自注意力機制可以在圖像補丁上提取全局關係，但無法建模圖像的局部結構。<lb/>為了克服這些限制，我們提出了由圖形卷積網絡增強的層次視覺Transformer (GCN-HViT) 用於圖像分類。<lb/>具體而言，我們設計的層次 ViT 可以在每個層級內以全局範圍建模補丁級信息交互，並在多個層級之間建模小補丁和大補丁之間的層次關係。<lb/>此外，所提出的 GCN 方法作為局部特徵提取器，獲取每個圖像補丁的局部表示，這作為每個補丁在 2D 空間中的 2D 位置嵌入。<lb/>同時，它在每個層級內以局部範圍建模補丁級信息交互。<lb/>在 3 個現實世界數據集上的廣泛實驗表明，GCN-HViT 實現了最先進的性能。
2604.16823.author: Haibin Jiao et.al.
